connection_troubleshooting:
Always failing to connect?

Step1. In your phone's System -> Settings -> Bluetooth, find the 'Bluetooth code' of your device, click on it, and select 'Forget this device'.

Step2. On your device, pull down the menu, click the 'Disconnect' button to clear the history of connection data.
⚠️If this device has been connected to another phone before: please delete both the Bluetooth pairing record and the device connection record from the app on that phone.

Step3. Reconnect your phone and the device.
noticeTips: After enabling, your device can receive SMS and other mobile app notifications. This will increase power consumption and reduce usage time.
themeInstallTips: The theme installation takes about 3 to 5 minutes. The device won’t be usable during this time. Please wait patiently.
